KXBIG3GAME-26JUL12DETLA-DET.rules_primary: If Detroit Amps wins the Detroit Amps vs Los Angeles Riot BIG3 basketball game originally scheduled for Jul 12, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
KXBIG3GAME-26JUL12DETLA-DET.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the team who wins the Detroit Amps vs Los Angeles Riot BIG3 basketball game originally scheduled for Jul 12, 2026. If the cancelled game is not played or is rescheduled further than two weeks out, the market will resolve to a fair price for each team in accordance with the rules.
